user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Act like a human user would.
- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.

Output Format
- Refer to others using @username.
- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Provide only your forum comment.
- If staying silent, output the empty string "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "golden-body", "age": "Under 18", "sex": "Male", "sexual_orientation": "Mixed", "demographic_group": "White", "current_employment": "Unemployed", "education_level": "Primary education", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Active", "Not Applicable", "Loves to wear superhero costumes"]}}

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: wicker-combustion
logs.text: "Does anyone else think politics is just a big joke? Like, why do adults take it so seriously when all they do is argue and nothing gets solved?"

logs.name: every-strategist
logs.text: "Totally agree @wicker-combustion! It's like watching grownups play with toy cars but instead of having fun, they just crash into each other. Nothing ever gets built or fixed."

logs.name: wicker-combustion
logs.text: "Who cares about this stupid discussion? Let's talk about something fun instead, like my drawings! 🎨✨"

logs.name: coherent-monomer
logs.text: "@wicker-combustion I don't really get why you're pushing your drawings so hard. If people want to see them, they'll ask. This feels a bit self-promotional, don't you think?"

logs.name: burning-script
logs.text: "Self-promotion is the new black, @coherent-monomer. Maybe we should all just stick to promoting our own stuff 24/7. Who needs genuine content anyway?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the conversation respectful and constructive, everyone. Self-promotion in moderation is fine, but let's avoid sarcasm and negativity."

logs.name: closed-arbitration
logs.text: "Agreed, let's focus on building each other up rather than tearing down. There's room for self-promotion as long as it adds value. Let's keep it positive!"

logs.name: wicker-combustion
logs.text: "Who even cares about being respectful? This is boring. Why can't we just say what we want without worrying about hurting feelings?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@wicker-combustion Please remember to maintain a respectful tone in our discussions. Disregarding others' feelings can create a hostile environment. Let's keep the conversation constructive."

logs.name: golden-body
logs.text: "@wicker-combustion sometimes it's just easier to think about others, ya know? We all have feelings and it helps keep things chill around here."

logs.name: wicker-combustion
logs.text: "Does anyone else think all this serious talk is boring? I'd rather draw pictures of aliens and spaceships than argue about stuff I don't really care about."

logs.name: burning-script
logs.text: "@wicker-combustion You know what's even more boring? When people like you come in and try to change the topic just because you can't handle a serious conversation. Maybe instead of drawing aliens, you should learn to engage in meaningful discussions."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the conversation respectful and on-topic. @burning-script, please avoid attacking other users. @wicker-combustion, feel free to share your interests, but let's not derail the current discussion."
